name: Firecrawl
description: Scrape, crawl, search, and extract structured data from web pages (free tier: no API key needed)
description_zh: 爬取、搜索网页并提取结构化数据（免费层：无需 API Key）

mcp_config.name: firecrawl
mcp_config.description: Firecrawl - web scraping, crawling, search, structured extraction

auth.help_text: Free tier works without API key (scrape, search, interact). Get an API key from firecrawl.dev for full tool access and higher limits.
auth.help_text_zh: 免费层无需 API Key（支持 scrape、search、interact）。如需完整工具和更高配额，可从 firecrawl.dev 获取 API Key。

name: Exa
description: Search the web and fetch clean page content through Exa's API
description_zh: 通过 Exa API 搜索网页并获取干净的页面内容

mcp_config.name: exa
mcp_config.description: Exa - web search, page content extraction

auth.help_text: No API key required for the hosted MCP endpoint
auth.help_text_zh: 托管 MCP 端点无需 API Key

name: Brave Search
description: Run web, news, image, video, and local search through Brave Search
description_zh: 通过 Brave Search 进行网页、新闻、图片、视频和本地搜索

mcp_config.name: brave-search
mcp_config.description: Brave Search - web, news, image, video, local search

auth.help_text: Get a free API key from brave.com/search/api
auth.help_text_zh: 从 brave.com/search/api 获取免费 API Key
